originalFeedback.description: The original feedback provided by the user.
originalFeedback.title: Original Feedback

improvedFeedback.description: The feedback refined by SCDFT for total clarity: clear, structured, and manager-ready.
improvedFeedback.title: Improved Feedback

toneUsed.description: The tone applied (e.g., honest and constructive, professional and actionable).

status.description: The success or failure status of the processing (e.g., 'success' or 'error').

timestamp.description: The processing timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

context.title: Context
context.description: The context of the feedback (if provided).

auditHash.title: Audit Hash
auditHash.description: A unique SHA‑256 hash of the output for audit trail and accountability.
